name: faraday
description: Faraday monorepo — the @faraday-academy/cli scaffolder, the runtime + addon packages lessons pin, and live example lessons.

scripts.test:platform: pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-contracts test && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-core test && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-artifact-router test && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-studio-build test && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-studio-sandbox test && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-adapter-supabase test
scripts.typecheck:platform: pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-artifact-router typecheck && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-studio-build typecheck && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-studio-sandbox typecheck && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform-adapter-supabase typecheck && pnpm --filter @faraday-academy/platform typecheck
scripts.verify:quick: pnpm harness:docs && pnpm harness:boundaries && pnpm typecheck:platform && pnpm test:platform
